open_items.description: Verify that all environment variables, permission scopes, and resource limits for the first tiny live autonomy pilot are correctly set and validated before any autonomous action is executed.
open_items.title: Confirm pilot sandbox environment provisioning

response: Wake seeded for the first tiny live autonomy pilot. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item: confirm that the pilot's sandbox environment variables and permission scopes are correctly provisioned before the first autonomous action is attempted. A single wake is scheduled to resolve this item using the designated recall context.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item pilot-env-provisioning-check: review and confirm sandbox environment variables and permission scopes are correctly provisioned for the first tiny live autonomy pilot.
